title: tests: make it easer to override the location of the copy helper
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind other

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Make it possible to override the location of the `copy` test helper by setting its location in an environment variable, as we do for `imgtype`.

#### How to verify it

This is a tweak to how we cache images for integration tests.  They should continue to pass.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

Related to #3297.

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```
None
```
